title: Add manual player addition option in host dashboard (all game types)

requirements.summary: Add React Query hooks for hostAddPlayer and searchPlayers backend functions
acceptanceCriteria: A useHostAddPlayer mutation hook is added to useQueries.ts
A useSearchPlayers query hook is added to useQueries.ts
Both hooks follow the existing patterns (error handling, invalidation, toast feedback) in useQueries.ts

file_operations.description: Add useHostAddPlayer mutation hook that accepts sessionId and playerId/principal, invalidates session queries on success, and shows toast feedback. Add useSearchPlayers query hook that accepts a search term string and returns matching PlayerSearchResult records. Both hooks follow existing patterns in the file for error handling and cache invalidation.

requirements.summary: Add 'Add Player Manually' section in HostSessionDashboard for all game types
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Add Player Manually' section is visible in the host dashboard for all game types
Host can type a player name into a search input and see matching registered players
Each search result shows the player's name and rating, with an 'Add' button
Clicking 'Add' calls the hostAddPlayer mutation and shows a success toast or inline error
Already-added players do not appear in search results
The UI integrates consistently with the existing dashboard styling and tab structure

file_operations.description: Add a new 'Add Player Manually' section within the existing tabbed interface. Include a text input for player name search using the useSearchPlayers hook with debouncing. Display matching results in a list showing player name and mobile number, with an 'Add' button per result. Use the useHostAddPlayer mutation when 'Add' is clicked, showing success toast on success and inline error feedback on failure. Filter out players already in the session from search results. Style consistently with existing tabs and use shadcn/ui components (Input, Button, Card) to match the dashboard design. Ensure this section is visible for all session types (random, round-robin, ladder, king-queen).
